remarks: Discover the perfect blend of space and modern comfort at 26 Rowan Street, Apt. 2 in Norwalk, CT! This beautifully renovated 3-bedroom duplex offers approximately 1,500 sq. ft. of stylish living space with luxury trim, high-end finishes, and a spacious layout designed for everyday living.  Step outside to enjoy your private porch, or relax in the large shared backyard, offering plenty of outdoor space to enjoy. Additional conveniences include off-street parking and laundry hookups. The owner pays for water, while the tenant is responsible for heat, hot water, gas, and electricity.  Ideally located close to shopping, dining, parks, public transportation, and major highways, this move-in-ready home provides the space, comfort, and convenience you've been looking for. Schedule your private showing today!  The owner pays for water, while the tenant is responsible for heat, hot water, gas, and electricity. Agent owner.
